data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS/SSL for data transit and AES for data at rest.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Offers 2FA for enhanced user account security.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS and authenticator apps for 2FA.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and identifies potential threats to platform security.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a mix of AI-based algorithms and manual oversight.

data.title: Incident Response Protocol
data.description: Well-defined protocols to handle data breaches and security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Real-time response systems with event logging and forensics capabilities.

data.title: Account Security Features
data.description: Options like secure password reset and suspicious login alerts.
data.technical_spec: Email and app-based notifications for unusual activity.
